configurePresets.name: ci-base
configurePresets.description: Shared CI defaults. dht, sigslot, small, utp, and wide-integer are packaged by (almost) no distro, so look for system copies only where a preset opts back in.

configurePresets.name: ci-ubuntu
configurePresets.description: simdutf: TODO use the system copy once CI runs on Ubuntu 26.04.

configurePresets.name: ci-linux-release
configurePresets.description: clang instead of gcc to work around https://gcc.gnu.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=109717

configurePresets.name: ci-sanitizer-linux
configurePresets.description: asan+lsan+ubsan test build. Vendored libarchive exercises its ExternalProject scripts on Linux.

configurePresets.name: ci-clang-tidy-linux
configurePresets.description: Generates compile_commands.json for the ctcache-backed clang-tidy run; nothing is fully built.

configurePresets.name: ci-utp-disabled
configurePresets.description: Builds the core with ENABLE_UTP=OFF to keep the no-utp configuration compiling.

configurePresets.name: ci-crypto
configurePresets.description: Core + tests against an alternative crypto backend; pass -DWITH_CRYPTO=<backend>.

configurePresets.name: ci-fedora
configurePresets.description: ENABLE_WERROR is off because rawhide's fresh toolchains routinely add new warnings.

configurePresets.name: ci-macos
configurePresets.description: --system-header-prefix=fmt/ suppresses warnings from brewed fmt headers.

configurePresets.name: ci-macos-from-git-and-brew
configurePresets.description: Build from a git checkout against brew-provided dependencies.

configurePresets.name: ci-macos-from-tarball
configurePresets.description: Build from the source tarball with fully vendored dependencies, validating that the tarball builds standalone.

configurePresets.name: ci-sanitizer-macos
configurePresets.description: asan+ubsan test build (no lsan on macOS).

configurePresets.name: ci-windows-base
configurePresets.description: Dependencies come prebuilt from prepare-deps-win32 via $env{DEPS_PREFIX}; everything else is vendored.

configurePresets.name: ci-windows
configurePresets.description: ccache cannot cache /Zi debug info, so store it in the objects (/Z7) instead.

configurePresets.name: ci-sanitizer-windows
configurePresets.description: MSVC ASan build. RelWithDebInfo avoids Debug's /RTC1, which is incompatible with ASan; Qt is on so the Qt unit tests run under ASan. Sanitizer flags come from CFLAGS/CXXFLAGS in the workflow.

configurePresets.name: ci-clang-tidy-windows
configurePresets.description: Generates compile_commands.json for the ctcache-backed clang-tidy run; nothing is fully built.

configurePresets.name: ci-bsd
configurePresets.description: Portability smoke test: GUI clients are covered on non-emulated runners, and LTO is too slow for an emulated VM.

configurePresets.name: ci-freebsd
configurePresets.description: FreeBSD is the one platform that packages dht.

configurePresets.name: ci-netbsd
configurePresets.description: Builds with pkgsrc gcc14; natpmp and simdutf are not packaged.
